programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Oscar winner Robert De Niro ("Raging Bull") and Oscar nominee John Travolta ("Pulp Fiction") star as two Bosnian War veterans hunting each other in this thrilling game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: On the Edge
programme.desc: When a young basketball player becomes entangled with drug dealers, he turns to an ex-cop and former private eye. Starring Ice-T, Gary Busey, Fred Williamson and Jim Brown.

programme.desc: The new kid in school must battle a gang of tough street kids after stealing the gang leader's girl. Starring James Spader, Kim Richards and Robert Downey Jr.

programme.title: Monty Python's Life of Brian

programme.title: The Little Hours

programme.title: Alice In Wonderland
programme.desc: A twisted retelling of the classic tale.

programme.title: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: A modern retelling of the classic fairy tale.

programme.title: Dirty
programme.desc: Hard-edged story of a gangbanger turned cop who is forced to choose between his conscience and his loyalty to the code of blue all in the course of one day.

programme.title: 7 Seconds
programme.desc: When an experienced thief accidentally makes off with a Van Gogh, his partner is kidnapped by gangsters in pursuit of the painting, forcing the criminal to hatch a rescue plan.

programme.title: Company Of Heroes

programme.title: The Marine 6: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Jake Carter and another former Marine, Luke Trapper, join forces to rescue a kidnapped girl from a gang of international criminals.Continuation of the franchise. (Edited for Television)

programme.title: Miracle On The Mountain: The Kincaid Family Story
programme.desc: A dysfunctional family must pull together to survive a plane crash in the wilderness.

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: It is 1942 and Norway is under the thumb of the Nazis. In a Norwegian factory, Nazis are producing "heavy water," an essential element in the production of atomic weapons. The leader of the Norwegian underground is enlisted by British intelligence to aid in destroying the factory.

programme.title: Meet The Stewarts
programme.desc: A working stiff agrees to marry a socialite on the condition that they are able to live within his modest means.

programme.title: Eight Iron Men
programme.desc: A beleaguered Army squadron risk their lives to rescue a fellow soldier trapped behind enemy lines.

programme.title: Pushover
programme.desc: An honest detective's pursuit of a bank robber drags him into a deadly affair with the crook's moll.

programme.title: Shopworn
programme.desc: Stanwyck is a waitress engaged to Toomey though his mother opposes her son's marriage to Stanwyck. After her release, from a three-month prison sentence, Stanwyck becomes an overnight musical sensation and renews her romance with Toomey and his mother finally consents to the marriage.

programme.title: Jane Got A Gun
programme.desc: A woman asks her ex-lover for help in order to save her outlaw husband from a gang out to kill him.

programme.title: The Ticket
programme.desc: A blind man who regains his vision finds himself becoming metaphorically blinded by his obsession for the superficial.

programme.title: Breakfast Of Champions
programme.desc: A rich car dealer is losing his mind. His son lives in the bomb shelter. His suicidal wife has an affair with his transvestite sales manager.

programme.title: The Real Blonde
programme.desc: Joe and Mary have been living together in Manhattan for six years. Joe is an actor, who has no agent and no thesping credits, but whose ambitions are very high. He works as a waiter at a cafe. Mary works as a make-up stylist for hot fashion photographer Blair, and she pays most of the pair's bills. Joe finally lowers his standards and accepts a degrading bit in a Madonna video, while his friend and co-waiter Bob gets a high-paying job on a soap opera opposite siren Kelly.

programme.title: 24 Hours to Live
programme.desc: A former special-ops marine turned mercenary is given one last shot at redemption.

programme.desc: Arthur Bishop thought he had put his murderous past behind him when a foe kidnaps the love of his life.

programme.title: The Hunter's Prayer
programme.desc: A deadly assassin (Sam Worthington) is marked for death when he can’t bring himself to kill a young woman.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: A police inspector tracks down a deranged villain who is out to kidnap his daughter.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: An ex-con and his adopted brother go on the run with a weapon of mysterious origin as their only protection.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: Special ID
programme.desc: An undercover cop (Donnie Yen) infiltrates one of China's most ruthless crime syndicates. He must risk everything to protect his family and his life after the boss (Collin Chou) vows to find and kill every traitor in his organization.

programme.title: Code of the Assassins
programme.desc: Trained by the best, a young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family's massacre years ago. Failing to complete his mission, he becomes a fugitive hunted by the government, rival assassin groups and other shadowy killers.

programme.title: Rise of the Legend
programme.desc: A powerful martial arts master (Eddie Peng) returns to the town where his father was murdered to take on a ruthless crime boss (Sammo Hung).

programme.title: Deliver Us From Evil
programme.desc: An assassin goes to Thailand in order to solve a kidnapping case and finds himself chased by a man whose sibling he killed.

programme.title: Boy in the Walls
programme.desc: Alisa can't shake the feeling that someone is always watching her.

programme.title: Missing at 17
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl, Candace, runs away from home.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: Following a difficult breakup in a string of failed relationships.

programme.title: The Girl He Met Online
programme.desc: Sexy 23-year-old Gillian has no trouble attracting men.

programme.title: Boy in the Walls
programme.desc: Alisa can't shake the feeling that someone is always watching her.

programme.title: Missing at 17
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl, Candace, runs away from home.

programme.title: The Secrets of Comfort House
programme.desc: A murder investigation in a small town focuses on Wendy Sinclair, who runs a shelter for the victims' wives.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Liz and Kappa Psi Psi prep for Gamma Fair and T-shirt sales. Alan’s class inspires Anna’s look change.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Love's Playlist
programme.desc: Music exec Amanda clashes with brand rep Sam at a launch party, unaware she already met him online.

programme.title: My Mother's Stalker
programme.desc: Old friends gets together for a high school reunion, only for a crime to set off a series of tragic events.

programme.title: I'm In Love With A Church Girl
programme.desc: A reformed drug trafficker finds unexpected love with a woman guided by strong faith, testing his resolve to leave his criminal past behind.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Blessed & Cursed
programme.desc: Pain, Deceit and Triumph are just some of the plots twists that viewers will experience in this highly anticipated movie! A modern retelling of the dramatic Biblical account of Saul and David, Blessed & Cursed stars Gospel sensation Deitrick Haddon in his first theatrical debut as Dwight Hawkins an incredibly gifted young man who is in search of his purpose amid setbacks and unexpected surprises!

programme.title: Choppa City Queens
programme.desc: Best friends Leah, Jada and Shanice lose their jobs, are unable to find new work, and struggling to make ends meet. One day, Leah comes across a gunrunner hiding a bag of AK-47’s. Leah strikes up a deal with him to buy his guns and sell them on the black-market. Things start going well with the women selling guns until Shanice’s boyfriend, Marquis, finds out the truth. Marquis and his cousin Berg then decide they are going to steal the guns from the woman and set up their own operation.

programme.title: Bumher
programme.desc: When Jalisa Church finds her fiancé Tim 24 hours after he proposes in bed with another, it leads her to find love in a very unusual way after meeting a man named Jacob Reaves.

programme.title: The Perfect Mother
programme.desc: Linda, a determined mother, faces the daily struggles of raising her son Ahmad amidst the unpredictable presence of her husband Jeremy. When a series of hardships push her to the edge, Linda's plea for assistance inadvertently leads to Ahmad being taken into CPS custody. Linda rises to the challenge of overcoming adversary to reunite her family and save her son.

programme.title: Love Inside the Drug Game
programme.desc: A rent hike forces Lamar to consider transporting drugs for shady dealer Sean. A watchful detective sniffs them out, and a money shortage with Sean throws their risky plan into chaos. Can they outrun the cops and fix the mess before it's too late?

programme.title: Dracula's Curse
programme.desc: A team of vampire hunters set out to battle an evil vampire clan in the dark underworld.

programme.title: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A couple plans a weekend at a mountain resort and are stalked by the man's evil twin.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Treasure
programme.desc: A treasure hunter is forced into a deadly race to uncover a Christian relic and history’s greatest treasure.

programme.title: Monster Island
programme.desc: Gigantic monsters threaten to destroy everything in their path as mankind remains defenseless.

programme.title: Independents' Day
programme.desc: Aliens invade Earth, tell humans to emigrate to a new planet or die. The President and a militia fight back.

programme.title: Bloody Bites
programme.desc: Streaming exclusively from Bloody Disgusting and Scotchworthy Productions, Bloody Bites is a compilation of snack-sized horror films that will terrorize, astonish, disturb, and excite genre fans across the globe.

programme.title: Hell House LLC 3: Lake of Fire (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Set one year after the events of HELL HOUSE LLC 2, the Abaddon Hotel is on the verge of being torn down. It is purchased by billionaire Russell Wynn as the new home for his popular interactive show, Insomnia. He invites Vanessa Sheppard and her film crew to record everything leading up to the performance. They encounter a nefarious plot - one that threatens to unleash a veritable hell on earth.

programme.title: Hell House LLC 2
programme.desc: It's been eight years since the opening night tragedy of Hell House, LLC and still many unanswered questions remain. Thanks to an anonymous tip, investigative journalist Jessica Fox is convinced that key evidence is hidden inside the abandoned Abaddon Hotel-evidence that will shed light on the hotel's mysteries. She assembles a team equally hungry for answers with one goal: break into the hotel and discover the truth.

programme.title: The Innkeepers (Edited Version)
programme.desc: After over one hundred years of service, The Yankee Pedlar Inn is shutting its doors for good. The last remaining employees -Claire (Sara Paxton) and Luke (Pat Healy)- are determined to uncover proof of what many believe to be one of New England's most haunted hotels. As the Inns final days draw near, odd guests check in as the pair of minimum wage ghost hunters begin to experience strange and alarming events that may ultimately cause them to be mere footnotes in the hotels long unexplained history.

programme.title: Heavy Trip
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy from Finland, Turo is stuck in a small village where the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. The only problem? He and his bandmates have practiced for over a decade without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from Norwaythe promoter for a huge heavy metal music festivaland decide its now or never. They steal a van, a corpse, and even a new drummer in order to make their dreams a reality.

programme.title: Crowsnest
programme.desc: Five young friends on a road trip are terrorized by nomadic cannibals in a huge RV. The video they recorded is discovered by police as evidence in their still-unsolved murders.

programme.title: The Last Drive-In With Joe Bob Briggs
programme.desc: A horror aficionado begins to teach an unsuspecting applicant the rules of his video store, but is soon suspected of something sinister.

programme.title: Joe Bob's Ghoultide Get-Together
programme.desc: Not even Santa Claus is safe from the evil that descends on Bailey Downs, a small town that is suddenly plagued with malevolent spirits, zombie elves and Krampus - the anti-Santa Claus.

programme.title: The Last Drive-In with Joe Bob Briggs: Joe Bob's Helloween
programme.desc: A maniacal killer clown stalks a young woman babysitting two teens on Halloween night.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Culture" - The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The Local Knowledge crew FINALLY make it to the Bahamas and the incredible Green Turtle Club for a week of fishing, diving, and exploring the Abaco Island chain. With two incredible boats at our disposal, we make the 200 mile crossings from Miami and Cape Canaveral to rendezvous at Green Turtle Cay. Stay tuned for Part one of our Bahamas adventure!

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The Green Turtle Cay adventure continues as the LK crew uncovers more of what the incredible out islands of the Bahamas have to offer. Shifting gears to bottom fishing, Ali catches a fish of a lifetime while Rush gets to dive and spearfish with the locals.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Back in San Diego and with Rockfish on the mind, the LK crew fish new grounds and depths to catch these iconic Southern California bottom fish. Along for the ride is pro snowboarder and friend Dave Downing to round out this epic rock cod fishing trip.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: With the drastic changes in the Southern California fishery over the past several years, it has been easy to get fixated on targeting large Bluefin tuna and going all out on what many have coined "big fish" fishing. On this episode Ali and Rush take advantage of the many other opportunities this time of year has to offer and switch focus back to the basics, targeting smaller yellowfin, bluefin, and mahi on bait.

programme.title: AFTCO Original Film
programme.desc: Set in Wisconsin, “Up North” explores the passion and pursuit of the midwestern angler. Whether they’re breaking ice on Green Bay to chase trophy walleye or traveling up to the Northwoods to carry on years of family traditions, Kaitlin and Josh Woodward embody a passion for fishing in its truest form. After fishing together for nearly 11 years, the Woodwards started a part-time guiding business in 2019 called Woodward Fishing to share their passion for their own Wisconsin waters. Some of Kaitlin’s favorite memories on the water have been in Green Bay chasing trophy fish; she recounts, “Every cast was a pre-spawn 25” -27” walleye; it was unreal.” Their teamwork and drive on the water are unmatched. Josh brings his determination to find the fish, and Kaitlin brings her tenacity and ability to get everyone back to the purity of nature no matter what the day brings. They have guided together for the past four years in the Northwoods of Wisconsin and Green Bay, and both areas hold an equally special place for the Woodwards. Josh cut his teeth fishing in Green Bay and Sturgeon Bay with his grandfather and grew up going to the Northwoods with his family. These traditions have become a way of life for Josh and Kaitlin as their year revolves around making the most of the season in both locations with their favorite boat dog, Kimber, in tow. “My family was here before my time, and now we’re going to pass that on to our kids.” – Josh Woodward Follow their adventures as they put AFTCO fishing rain gear to the test in our newest AFTCO Original Film, “Up North.”

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Set in the beautiful mountain resort Zlatibor, the fifth stage of the Strongman Champions League 2017 sees 14 athletes from across the world competing for the gold medal of SCL Serbia 2017. The event welcomes top-athlete - and odds-on favourite - Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia), who has presented himself in an impressive shape so far. Can his opponents defeat him?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight’. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World’s Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer’s Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt’?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven’t given up yet.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let’s see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off Super Bowl week ó his unambiguously favorite week of the year ó by making Smash Burgers with crispy seared edges, while Carla Hall makes Ham and Cheese Croquettes with sweet chili Doritos for extra crunch. Guest Josh Capon brings his expert restaurant energy to the game day kitchen.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Super Bowl week continues as Carla Hall makes her show-stopping Baked Brie wrapped in flaky puff pastry with honey and nuts, which Clinton defends as the real MVP of any game day spread. The hosts debate the ideal balance between indulgent party food and something a little elegant, and share their best game day hosting strategies.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Valentine's Day week launches with Carla Hall making an Easy Chicken Curry that she considers the perfect romantic dinner: warming, aromatic, and impressive without being stressful. The hosts debate whether cooking for a date should feel effortless or theatrical and share their own most romantic food memories.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his legendary Sexy Time Chicken for Valentine's Day, a dish he swears exudes confidence, intention, and genuine romance with every bite. Guest Devyn Simone joins to share relationship etiquette wisdom, and the hosts explore what makes food truly feel romantic beyond just the recipe itself.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly arrives furious after producer Nick bans his gorgeous Ted Baker sweater due to moirÈ camera interference, and the ensuing sweater feud becomes the running gag of the episode as Chewed Up enters an Anything Goes week with no cooking theme and maximum creative freedom. Michael and Carla enjoy Clinton's frustration immensely.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon welcome Angie Rito and Scott Tacinelli, the chef-owners behind the celebrated New York restaurant Don Angie, for a lively episode dedicated to Italian American comfort food. The conversation begins with admiration for the restaurant’s iconic lasagna before shifting to the main event: a deeply flavorful, “life-changing” meatball recipe inspired by a blend of both chefs’ grandmothers’ traditions. As Angie and Scott walk through their process, they share chef-driven techniques like using a milk-soaked panade for moisture, puréed onions for even flavor distribution, and roasted garlic to avoid harsh raw bites. The hosts jump in with questions and personal anecdotes, sparking a broader discussion about Italian versus Italian American cooking, rule-breaking in the kitchen, and regional food identity—from Cleveland to New York. The group also plays a spirited round of “Discuss,” debating topics like garlic usage, cheese on seafood, and proper spaghetti etiquette, leading to humorous and opinionated exchanges. Along the way, they highlight the philosophy behind Don Angie’s food: bold, unapologetic flavors built on cheese, garlic, and tradition—without strict adherence to old-world rules. As the meatballs finish baking, they’re tossed in a simple, bright tomato sauce and served family-style, earning rave reviews from the hosts for their rich texture and layered flavor. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway of the chefs’ cookbook and a final celebration of Italian American cuisine, emphasizing creativity, collaboration, and the joy of cooking without limits.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly pitches his inspired Loaf Three Ways concept for Anything Goes week, proposing that each host make a different loaf ó savory, sweet, and somewhere in between ó in a format he has been developing for months. The hosts celebrate the Indiana Jones Temple of Doom opening number as the perfect anthem for a week with no rules.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly replaces cooking with a March Madness-style bracket tournament for boxed brownie mixes, staging eight brands in head-to-head blind taste tests to crown an ultimate winner. After an epic series of eliminations, Duncan Hines Double Fudge emerges victorious at just $4.29 a box.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Jackie Bakula, beloved as Sparkles to Chewed Up fans, returns to the kitchen as a guest host while Carla Hall is away filming the Today Show, bringing her warm, professional energy and joining Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly for a celebratory cooking episode full of affection for the show.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Korean-American chef Esther Choi joins for Meat Optional Week, making Kimchi Fried Rice that converts even committed carnivores, while Clinton Kelly prepares his beloved home-alone tofu dish and the hosts celebrate the surprising depth and satisfaction of meatless cooking.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall closes out Meat Optional Week with a bold Butternut Squash Chili served over golden rounds of pre-made polenta, proving that a vegetarian chili can be just as hearty and craveable as any meat-based version. The hosts discuss the magic of pot liquor, winter herb gardening, and the underappreciated power of cooking tomatoes long enough to balance their acidity.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: As Dave and Chris begin by predicting which U.S. cities will house the next generation of restaurants, they engage in a game of buying or selling pieces of culture.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: "Media Distortion and Lobster Vs. Crab" - Dave and Chris discuss the outsized response to Dave’s comments about Costco rotisserie chicken and how clickbait media distorts our views. Then, they go over everything Dave ate in Boston

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Honey Butter Popcorn" - Chris shares his go-to popcorn recipe that is delicious, simple, and perfect for family movie night!

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Hetty McKinnon's Eggplant Mapo" - Hetty McKinnon, an Australian Chinese cookbook author and James Beard Award finalist, stops by the studio to show Chris Ying how to make her Eggplant Mapo—a delicious twist on Mapo Tofu.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Nico de Leon's Inasal Fried Chicken Sandwich" - Chef Nico de Leon shares his recipe for a delicious twice fried Inasal Chicken Sandwich, bringing in Filipino flavors and plenty of pro tips for creating a beautiful sandwich.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Invitation to a Banquet: A Conversation with Fuchsia Dunlop" - Step into the vibrant world of Chinese cuisine with acclaimed author and culinary adventurer, Fuchsia Dunlop, as she unveils the flavors and stories behind her latest book, "Invitation to a Banquet." Dunlop stops by the Majordomo Media studio to chat with Chris Ying to discuss her lastest literary achivement and some perspectives from her 30+ years of studying Sichuan food and Chinese cuisine.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "The Pizza Anytime Cocktail with John deBary" - Chris Ying is joined by special guest, bartender and author John deBary, to make a 90's inspired cocktail from John's new book "Saved by the Bellini". John walks Chris through the steps to create his Pizza Anytime drink—a twist on a Bloody Mary that takes things in a Bagel Bites direction and results in a delicious savory cocktail.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang's Black Friday Leftover Sandwich v2.0!" - Dave does another version of his work-in-progress leftover sandwich that he's been working on to present to the MVP of the Black Friday Jets vs Dolphins game.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "A Truly Incredible Sweet Potato Pie from Malcolm Livingston II" - Acclaimed pastry chef Malcolm Livingston II shares an absolutely INSANE recipe for sweet potato pie that will blow up everything you thought you know about sweet potato pie. You want those sharp edges that could poke an eye out? Of course you do. And the density! Malcolm describes it "like fudge"...or "a perfect caramel that leaves the teethmarks when you bite through it." It's honestly amazing and you don't even have to take our word for it, you can just make it for yourself. Don't be that person that brings some soggy, sloppy pie to your holiday party...watch this video and take notes!

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Dave Chang makes BEER CAN CHICKEN the wrong way (and it’s so good)" - Two days after failing at his first ever Beer Can Chicken attempt, Dave gets right back on the horse. He’s committed to getting it right, keeping it simple, and making the white meat as delicious as the dark. Plus: he demonstrates a lazy man's beer pan sauce that will make you question ever doing things the “right” way again.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: The pursuit of the sweetest "honey" coffees on earth unleashes an adventure that includes "coffee monkeys", crocodiles, toucans, an exploration of the active crater of Volcan Poas, and surfing on the coast with a coffee farmer. The Costa Rican paradise reveals a uniquely artistic approach toward colorful honey coffees stored like wine and served just in time for a classic "coffee sock" brew.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey hits the streets of Bogota to check out the controversial trade in emeralds, the famous Juan Valdez Cafe, and some classic Colombian cuisine at an elevation of 10,000 feet. A flight to Armenia and subsequent Willy's Jeep trek uncover a remote and hidden world of quaint coffee towns and boutique farms where Joey hosts a group of international coffee buyers.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey is welcomed to Sao Paulo with a freshly brewed cup of excellence at The Coffee Lab in the trendy Madalena district. Joey checks out big coffee exporting in the Port of Santos with shipping containers stacked like legos, Jaco bird coffee (foraged from bird poop), and the world's largest savannah grassland, where Daterra Coffee Farms researches small-lot coffees on a massive scale.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Following an excursion to the extremely remote Gnobe Bugle Village, Joey Jeep-treks the terrain from the top of Volcan Baru. The search for coffee known to cost $1,000 per pound leads Joey to the eclectic town of Boquete, a plunge-worthy volcanic river-filled-crevasse, and awe-inspiring Gesha coffee farms with more rainbows and hummingbirds than one could possibly imagine.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey embarks on a journey through streets that have a 500+-year coffee history of scandal, triumph, and tragedy, from Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque and Topkapi Palace to coffee-infused nargile (hookah) and the trendy Karakoy District. Joey discovers and prepares the ultimate Turkish brew at Cup of Joy in time to catch the 13th-century coffee-inspired Whirling Dervish dancers.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: All roads in the pursuit of excellence lead to Japan. Joey discovers that specialty canned coffee from a vending machine pairs well with street food. Bullet train travel leads to a tea farm trek and tasting, coffee in a rickshaw, and Yemen mocha brewed Arab style. Joey makes coffee history in Kyoto preparing and brewing "Geisha" coffee with an authentic Japanese Geisha.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: In the wake of an expedition along the slopes of active volcanic calderas, Joey heads to Big Island Coffee where coffee, cacao, and papaya abound, sheep maintain the landscaping, and the coffee tastes like pop rocks. A Jurassic-inspired detour leads through Akaka Falls, the green turtle pools, and a vanilla bean farm. A salt-massaged coffee is celebrated with Rusty's Hawaiian Coffee Farms.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Wrangler Tailgate. Since picnickers in 1869 ate food from buckboards of horse-drawn wagons, Americans have loved tailgating. Now the party goes global, with pulled lamb from a wood-burning smoker at Odys & Penelope in L.A. Honey Soy Chicken Wings on skewers and Brisket Tacos, make magisterial main dishes. True global tailgating, with a Peruvian potato salad with chili-spiked cheese sauce.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Extreme Grilling. Long before grills, charcoal, rotisseries, and planchas, there was fire! We visit L.A.’s Chi SPACCA, for a monster pork tomahawk grilled over wood by chef Ryan DeNicola. Extreme grilling with salmon steaks, smoky, on a shovel in a blazing campfire. Caveman-style pork chops directly on blazing embers with a sizzling poblano pan-fry and decadent brownies on a cedar plank.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Grilling 24/7. The world’s pit masters, fire up grills, smokers, or wood-burning ovens for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and late night snacks. For breakfast, farm eggs grilled with Parmesan, and prosciutto. For lunch, pizzas from the Industrial Eats in Buellton, CA. Pastrami Beef Ribs make a spectacular supper, and midnight snack of smoky, salty South African Grilled Cheese sandwiches.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: One Good Turn. Rotisserie grilling or spit-roasting combines the smoky sear of grilling with the heat of roasting. Add 3 more benefits: basting, no flare-ups, and the fragrance of wood smoke. Game hens acquire golden, crackling-crisp skin. Spare ribs are given the huli-huli (turn-turn) treatment. Wings get a sweet-salty, lacquer-like glaze. Finally, a whole spinning, sugar-crusted pineapple.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Melting pot extreme, when traditional American barbecue meets authentic ethnic grilling and it’s happening across the United States and around the world. Cross-culture mashups, from California paella to a deli-inspired pork loin stuffed with pastrami and sauerkraut. Michelin-starred chef Josiah Citrin dazzles with aged, smoked-roasted duck at his restaurant, Charcoal Venice.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: We reinvent the cocktail party, with the power of live fire to take finger food over the top with rum and citrus-glazed jumbo shrimp grilled on sugarcane, “finger-burner” lamb chops from Spain and Smoked Nectarine Bellinis to keep conversation flowing. Sommelier Kristine Bocchino shares suggestions for three great wines to serve at the party.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Extending from California and the Pacific Northwest to Korea, Japan, and Southeast Asia. Explosively flavored grilled meats with exotic herbs and spices, chilies and umami-rich fish and soy sauce are paired with healthy vegetables—barbecue as health food. Vietnamese and Thai influences make the ultimate street food. Steven visits Jenee Kim for grilled beef short ribs.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: People have lots of reasons to upgrade their garages. Most want more organized storage and a cleaner, more attractive space. These homeowners want all of those things, but they also need a suitable home for a fast and shiny member of the family

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: When you work from home, sometimes you have to be really creative about where and how you set up your office. These homeowners had to carve a corner out of the Master Closet so we’re helping the make it both a better closet and a better office.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Join Danny, Chelsea and the crew as they bring a couple's 1980's kitchen into the twenty-first century. In part one we remove some dated cabinetry, dated lighting and the dreaded pop-corn ceiling before we lay out a new lighting plan and refinish the cabinets.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Join Danny, Chelsea and the crew as they bring a couple's 1980's kitchen into the twenty-first century. In part two we install a great new backsplash, add a cool coating to the counters and finalize the installation of the new lighting.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We're helping a retired homeowner re-kindle her love for the arts by converting her storage shed into an art studio. Once we clean-up the floor plan, add some cabinets and climate control… the space is ready to inspire it’s owner to create and enjoy it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This is part 1 of a two-part community-wide project to bring hope to Danny’s hometown after a devastating hurricane. The storm demolished a downtown building, leaving an eyesore empty lot but Danny and an army of volunteers are creating a beautiful pocket park to fill it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This is part 2 of a two-part community-wide project to bring hope to Danny’s hometown after a devastating hurricane. . The storm demolished a downtown building, leaving an eyesore empty lot but Danny and an army of volunteers are creating a beautiful pocket park to fill it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: When the house at the end of the cul-de-sac hasn't changed in 28 years, it's time for some front porch rehab! The owners love the house they raised their children in, but they want to update the look of the front porch and the overgrown landscaping that surrounds it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: A family with a tiny patio and a huge back yard gets some help from Danny and the crew to make use of their space. Adding a second patio of large format pavers starts the process, while some modifications to family’s storage shed and the addition of a fire pit wrap it up.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If your friends and family always enter your house through the laundry room, it better be a great one. Danny, Chelsea, and the crew rally to give this house a clean entrance complete with a cool new butcher block counter-top and an overflow pantry for the nearby kitchen.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This week we're helping a couple update a family room that looks smaller than it actually is. We’re removing part of a built-in cabinet system that overwhelms the room and adding some character to a fireplace wall to move it from “forgettable” to “focal.”

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny, Chelsea and the Today’s Homeowner team help a couple extend their living space to the outside with a patio transformation. After some clean-up and repair to an existing brick patio, they add a pergola and shade sail to enhance the space.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Seven Steps - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Counting to seven has never been more memorable and fun! Learn numbers with this simple counting song.

programme.title: Goodbye A, Goodbye Z - Super Simple ABCs and more
programme.desc: We're saying, "Goodbye" to all of our friends in Alphabet Village. As the school day ends, take a walk through town, and bid farewell to all of the letters.

programme.title: I Like To Ride My Bicycle (Mr. Monkey) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Let's go on a bike ride with Mr. Monkey and friends as we sing along to this Mr. Monkey version of the original Super Simple Song, "I Like To Ride My Bicycle." This is a great song to introduce during transportation themes! I like to ride my bicycle. I ride it every day. I ride it when I go to school. Or when I want to play.

programme.title: What's Your Name? - Kids Song - Finny the Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny the Shark is saying "Hello" and asking the question "What's your name?" This is a fun song to start the day at preschool! Hello, hello. What’s your name? Hello, hello. What’s your name? My name is Finny! My name is Myrtle! Nice to meet you.

programme.title: Wind The Bobbin Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Wind the bobbin up. Wind the bobbin up. Pull, pull, clap, clap, clap.” Get up and dance with this super fun version of the traditional English nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett flies to Battambang, Cambodia, to deliver a duck whistle to a girl named Solyna so she can help her parents herd their ducks into a truck; when the ducks escape, Sky scrambles Paul's Police Patrol to help. Jett delivers new basketball shoes to a boy named Manu in Spain who hopes that the shoes will allow him to dunk; when the shoes don't work, Jett and the Galaxy Wings take Manu to Mars.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Louisa in Germany goes to visit her favorite amusement park, she's sad to learn that it is being closed forever; the Super Wings work to give the park a makeover. Grand Albert's Telephoto Transformer is mistakenly delivered to a boy named Marcel who lives in Paris. When the camera makes a beetle grow into a giant insect it's up to Jett and Dizzy's Rescue Riders to save the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Grand Albert's Telephoto Transformer is mistakenly delivered to a boy named Marcel who lives in Paris. When the camera makes a beetle grow into a giant insect it's up to Jett and Dizzy's Rescue Riders to save the city. A girl from Bangkok, Thailand, orders a baby carriage to take her kitten in to a famous local market. Chaos ensues when the cat escapes but Dizzy's Rescue Riders arrive to help.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy who lives on Mont Saint Michel in France wants to build the biggest and best sandcastle ever. With the power of teamwork, Loic might just see that dream come true - if they can save the sandcastle from a giant wave! When a girl in China gets the role of the Monkey King in a Beijing Opera version of "Journey to the West", Jett delivers an all important prop - the Monkey King's magical staff.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and the Build-It Buddies help a boy rescue animals. Jett delivers a hamster ball to a girl in Turkey.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a Selfie Stick to a boy named Anders in Norway. Jett joins Anders on a camping trip with his Dad that takes a strange turn when beavers disrupt their campsite. A girl who lives in Tuscany loves the constellations. She's even discovered one of her own. But when the constellation vanishes, a trip into space with the Galaxy Wings is the only way to find out why and fix it.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a basket to a boy named Huddin in Moscow so he can deliver some special bread to his mom. Jett needs the help of Paul's Police Patrol when the bread gets left on a subway car. Jett delivers a cooking kit to a boy in Portland, USA and helps him make tofu rice burgers in his family's food truck. Dizzy's Rescue Raiders arrive to help when they get more customers than they can handle.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a surfboard to a girl named Clara who lives on the Gold Coast, Australia. Mira's Wild Team is called in to teach Clara to surf, but everyone winds up getting more than they bargained for when they also wind up helping to rescue a shark! Jett delivers a lion costume to a girl in London England. She is easily startled and hopes that the costume will make her brave.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a Hungarian Gypsy Fiddle to a girl named Petra in Budapest. Petra takes it to an amazing island, but the animals in the petting zoo are entranced by the music. A princess in England is excited about her five dogs attending a royal ball in fancy costumes that Jett delivers. But when a prince attending the ball is scared of the dogs Jett volunteers to puppy-sit and the dogs escape.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett calls in Paul and his Police Patrol pals to help a little girl named Isabella celebrate her birthday in one of the loneliest, most remote locations in the world. Jett brings a Veterinarian Kit to a boy named Adika at Serengeti National Park in Tanzania. Jett joins Adika on a fieldcall to investigate an elephant stuck in the middle of the road.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a giant Snakes and Ladders game to Anita who is having a pajama party with her friends. To complete a game challenge, Donnie's Build-It Buddies turn Anita's bed into a princess' carriage. A boy named Ray who lives in Palau, South Pacific, wants to see a Manta Ray in the wild. Jett and the Wild Team do their best to help him find one but end up trapped in a Blue Hole.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a friendship bracelet to Catalina for her pen pal Vo the Rover. But when Vo goes missing, Astra and the Galaxy Wings take them to outer space to search for her. While on his way to deliver a package to a boy named Omar, Jett gets stuck in quicksand in the Sahara desert. Worried that Jett is overdue, Omar contacts Sky, and Paul's Police Patrol is sent.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When Jett delivers a toy vacuum cleaner to a boy in Switzerland Donnie modifies it to be "bigger and better". But the new vacuum is too powerful and gets away. When World Airport Delivery Depot manager Neo's drones replace the Super Wings, one delivers an empty package to a girl in South Korea. Jett finds what she ordered in Donnie's hangar... but the drones won't give it up!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a wedding ring to a boy named Christo whose Dad is getting married. Trouble arises when a pelican snatches the ring. Jett delivers a tree tap and bucket to a girl in Quebec. But one tap can't produce enough sap to make the maple candies Manon wants to bring to a maple syrup festival. Donnie's Build-It Buddies bring all the gear needed, but a syrupy spill causes a major roadblock.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a sticker book to a boy named Victor in Mexico whose Mom has a plan: if Victor earns 10 stickers by doing 10 chores, she'll give him a big reward. Jett and the Build-it Buddies come up with an elaborate plan to help rush a crop of small, unripe kiwifruit to market. But the kiwifruit grow too big too fast, and cause a giant kiwifruit avalanche.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a costume to a boy named Nav in Abu Dhabi for an Air Show competition.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy deliver a package of harmless hair dyes and a grooming kit to a girl named Olenca in Cusco, Peru. Olenca wants to dye her pet alpacas with pretty colors. However, the animals don't like the process, panic, and run away. When a girl in Guangzhou, China brings her cat to a famous festival of lights in Huacheng Square, the cat takes off, chasing after at the light show's laser beams.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language! Enjoy upbeat, classical melodies as you learn how to sign words and activities related to common main street businesses, where your food comes from, activities related to dining out and more. Learn through real-life footage, narration, and repetition.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Sing along to your favorite classical melodies and enjoy engaging imagery in this space and sky themed episode. Young viewers can learn words like star and moon through repetition and narration, explore with the Baby Einstein characters, or simply dance along.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Old Macdonald & More Popular Rhymes
programme.desc: Traditional songs are great for learning a new language! Practice the animals in English with this timeless classic about farm animals!

programme.title: Little Red Car - Unlimited Songs
programme.desc: Each this animated children's rhymes compilation with colorful characters, along with catchy music.

programme.title: Colors Song Kids Learning Videos
programme.desc: Kids educational songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Farmees as they sing, dance in this fun kids learning video. Learn about Colors, alphabets, fruits, planets, phonics, numbers, abc, shapes, 123 and more made easy and fun with this preschool nursery rhymes and kids songs playlist.

programme.title: Ben The Train Kids Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Ben the fun kids toy train is back with more songs and rhymes like old Macdonald, Alphabet song, phonics abc song, opposites song, incy wincy spider, five little monkeys, finger family etc. This family friendly children's show promotes learning and family bonds.

programme.title: Humpty Dumpty Nursery Rhymes and Kids Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Enjoy Farmees Humpty Dumpty and popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, which the children love to sing and dance along with. Learn these kids songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Wheels on the bus Nursery Rhyme and Kids Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the Train's nursery rhymes which children love. Learn songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Car Wash for Children - Kids Channel
programme.desc: The most popular car wash videos all in one place! This compilation features a wide number of vehicles!

programme.title: Wheels on The Firetruck + More Nursery Rhymes for Kids - Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Enjoy Boom Buddies nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, including Baby Shark, Fruits Song, and more!

programme.desc: A fast talking, travelling salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik various hedgehog-catching gadgets, including the Darkenator, the Super-duper Gravity Stopper, and the De-Atomizer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails gets a megadose of Robotniks growth gas and grows quickly to monstrous proportions, eating everything in sight and accidentally terrorizing the countryside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Apple Dumplin' wants to help Strawberry & her Friends with the baking. But Dumplin's just a little too little to be much help. In fact, she ends up making a pretty big mess of things.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple isn't paying attention when Strawberry describes their campout tradition of telling "Tall Tales." So Apple tells her thrilling adventure of a wild road rally she entered, only to surprise the girls by proving the story is actually true.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Angel Cake likes everything "just so" - and when things don't go her way, she's a pretty bad sport... until Strawberry & Apple Dumplin' help her become the berry best of sports.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake: she's really giving this festival all she has!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch!
